← All NHC examples

NHC1 — multi-race: race N+1 uses race N's newTcf as tcfApplied

Scoring system: NHC1    α (blend factor): 0.15 
4 boats, 3 races, α = 0.15.
Race 1: ETs 3000/3600/4200/4800 (matches fixture 01).
Race 2: shaken up — Alpha now slow (4500), Delta now fast (3300); Beta/Gamma unchanged.
Race 3: same finishes as race 2.

Verifies the propagation contract: each boat's "TCF used" in race N
equals its "newTcf" from race N-1.

Series totals (no discards):
  Alpha: 1 + 4 + 4 = 9  (one 1st, two 4ths)
  Beta:  2 + 2 + 2 = 6  (three 2nds, no wins)
  Gamma: 3 + 3 + 3 = 9  (three 3rds, no wins)
  Delta: 4 + 1 + 1 = 6  (two wins, one 4th)

A8.2 tie-breaking (most firsts): Delta beats Beta (2 vs 0);
Alpha beats Gamma (1 vs 0). Final order: Delta, Beta, Alpha, Gamma.
─── Race 1 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  ─── Race 2 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  ─── Race 3 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Race 1

Gun time: 14:00:00   α: 0.15   Finishers: 4   CTavg: 67m 15s   mean(TCF): 1.0250
RankNameSail # Finish timeETTCFappliedCT CTavg/CTfair TCFadjnew TCF Points
1 Alpha 1 14:50:00 50m 00s 0.9500 47m 30s 1.4158 1.3450 +0.0592 1.0092 1
2 Beta 2 15:00:00 60m 00s 1.0000 60m 00s 1.1208 1.1208 +0.0181 1.0181 2
3 Gamma 3 15:10:00 70m 00s 1.0500 73m 30s 0.9150 0.9607 -0.0134 1.0366 3
4 Delta 4 15:20:00 80m 00s 1.1000 88m 00s 0.7642 0.8406 -0.0389 1.0611 4

RankNameSail # Finish timeETTCFappliedCT CTavg/CTfair TCFadjnew TCF Points

2 Beta 2 15:00:00 60m 00s 1.0181 61m 05s 1.0956 1.1154 +0.0146 1.0327 2
3 Gamma 3 15:10:00 70m 00s 1.0366 72m 34s 0.9223 0.9561 -0.0121 1.0245 3
4 Alpha 1 15:15:00 75m 00s 1.0092 75m 42s 0.8842 0.8923 -0.0175 0.9917 4

Race 3

1 Delta 4 411 6 6
